system.notes:
Abilities

  • Ruinous Assault: If the Red Samurai does damage to a target with a melee attack, the target must make a Willpower (2) resistance test. If they fail, they gain the Impaired status.
  • Swift: The Red Samurai can take the Run action as a Minor Action, and the Move Action as a Free action (but can still only take each once per Combat Turn). The Red Samurai does not suffer Liability on tests when they take the Run action. WATCHMAN

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Thermographic, Vision Magnification:
  • Mash the Trigger: The Red Samurai does not suffer
  • recoil penalties.:
  • Improved Crit: On attacks with their Monosword, the
  • Red Samurai score a critical hit with their Crit Dice on:
  • a 5 or a 6, and they gain 1 additional hit on a crit.:
